title: Buy These 4 Low-Beta Stocks to Counter Market Volatility
text: It is imperative to build a portfolio of low-beta stocks to sail through a volatile market. J&J Snack Foods (JJSF), Erie Indemnity (ERIE), RenaissanceRe (RNR) and Huron (HURN) are well-poised to gain.

title: What Makes Erie Indemnity (ERIE) a Good Fit for 'Trend Investing'
text: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) could be a solid choice for shorter-term investors looking to capitalize on the recent price trend in fundamentally sound stocks. It is one of the many stocks that passed through our shorter-term trading strategy-based screen.

title: 5 Dividend-Paying Growth Stocks for an Uncertain September
text: We have narrowed our search to five dividend -paying growth stocks that have solid upside left for the rest of 2023. These stocks are: CAT, GES.
